_about: seed_template.json — author contract for new seeds for the ai-gm-fantasy-rpg plugin. Copy to lore/seeds/<your-seed>/seed.json, fill in entities (factions, characters, provinces), and strip the _about / _meta / _notes keys before passing to start_game. See schemas/README.md for the Option A mapping that explains why this file looks the way it does. Example seed id: age-of-dragons-1024.

_meta.era: 1024 CE (Age of Dragons — dragons return after 3 centuries of absence)

_notes: 1. All entity ids MUST match the pattern ^[a-z0-9_-]+$ (lowercase, digits, hyphen, underscore).
2. Names go in the 'name' field, NOT in the id.
3. game_id must be globally unique across all games. Convention: <seed-name>-<era>, e.g. 'age-of-dragons-1024'.
4. Cross-references (ruler_id, controller_id, location_id) MUST reference an existing entity id in this file. The validator will reject dangling references.
5. attributes.stats.* values MUST be in [0, 100]. attributes.resources.* values are non-negative integers.
6. attributes.diplomatic_relations maps <other_faction_id> to an integer in [-100, +100]. Omit pairs that are not relevant.
7. Strip _about, _meta, _notes before passing to start_game. The ai-gm core's validate_and_parse('state', ...) will reject unknown top-level keys.
8. seed.json must validate against schemas/state.json (schema_version must equal 1).
9. Optional entity types: 'unit' (military formation), 'resource' (a single resource node). Used less often; included in core schema for completeness.

entities._example_type: faction (a nation or major political entity)
entities.name: 샬로우스톤 수호자 (Shallowstone Defenders)

entities._example_type: character (a named individual: ruler, general, advisor, envoy)
entities.name: 린드웰 (Lyndwell)

entities._example_type: province (a map region: capital, city, strategic zone)
entities.name: 샬로우스톤 (Shallowstone)
